subcodes.title: Words spoken in 1915 in Akka
subcodes.first_line: I who must needs journey forth to every region and corner have raised My call and issued My summons in all cities [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: من آنچه باید بروم در جمیع اطراف و اکناف فریاد بزنم زدم در جمیع شهرها ندا
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action
